name: Hawaii Children's Discovery Center
tagline: Three-story interactive museum in Kakaako — hands-on exhibits that make learning feel like play.
bestTime: Weekday mornings for smallest crowds; great rainy-day option
kamaaina: Kamaaina rate available with Hawaii ID; check website for current pricing
talkStory: Opened in 1998 as Oahu's only dedicated children's museum, this 38,000-square-foot center was championed by local educators who traveled to mainland children's museums for inspiration. The 'Your Town' exhibit on the first floor -- complete with a working mini grocery checkout, fire truck, and doctor's office -- was designed with input from Honolulu keiki. Most families miss the third-floor Hawaiian Rainforest exhibit and the rotating cultural gallery.
